description: Create an angled flange adapter in SolveSpace on the XY plane. The design requires a main 80 mm diameter circle and a 10 mm diameter mounting hole centered at the end of a 35 mm long construction line angled at 45 degrees from the origin. Extrude the sketch to a thickness of 5 mm and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/angled_flange.slvs.
